name_cn:
【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB St bag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration series, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami, while the Toron handle, base, detachable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm
